git.head: CADOS_M01 closeout commit (see git log; prev 33b2932 init)

deferred: D1: Ariadne.AcadNative.arx relink blocked by live acad.exe (PID 49460) file lock (LNK1104) - environmental, not a code defect; identical TU linked into .crx; on-disk .arx is prior working binary; relinks on next lock-free build.

D2: native inspect.database.graph verified DIRECTLY (accoreconsole+.scr) but NOT yet routable via cadctl/router - needs autocad-router.ps1 native allow-list edit (out of scope this packet). Walking skeleton uses existing geometry_native ObjectARX extract.

D3: non-ASCII fidelity - native graph op funnels dxf_name/layer/block_name through acharToAscii -> '?' for code points >127 (e.g. Korean to '????????'). geometry_native path preserves bytes. ASCII-funnel widening / JSON-lib vendoring = M02.
D4: coverage - 30 of 480 catalogued ops implemented (29 v1-wired + native graph); rest catalogued/stub/blocked by design (phased).
D5: patch EXECUTION and visual RENDER are not_implemented safety shells (no destructive writes, no fake visual PASS). Live ARX named-pipe pump = design-only (deferred).
